description: Collect touched files and generate draft memory updates without mutating source-of-truth files directly.

steps.intent: Capture changed files for the current task.

steps.run: Read latest JSONL entries under project-memory/agent-os/tool-logs/
Render current-state draft from template with summary, changed files, and unresolved items.
Render next-actions draft with follow-up tasks and blockers.
Render decision-log draft only when a durable project decision was made.
steps.intent: Separate execution notes from durable decisions.

acceptance: Draft files exist even when source-of-truth files are dirty.
No direct mutation of project-memory/current-state.md occurs in the hook.
Output remains reviewable by human or agent before sync.
